title: Moh's Daggers
description: Miss pre-1.9 combat? Try a dagger!
body: Do you miss pre-1.9 combat? Try a dagger. With nearly 0 cooldown, you can click your enemies to death at stunning speeds! This mod is available for Forge 1.20.1 and NeoForge 1.21.1/1.21.8. It's also compatible with Better Combat (versions 1.1+)
